question_text: Which statement correctly describes the relationship between frequency and pitch?

options.label: A
options.text: Higher frequency sounds have a lower pitch

options.label: B
options.text: Frequency and pitch are not related

options.label: C
options.text: Higher frequency sounds have a higher pitch

options.label: D
options.text: Pitch is measured in metres per second

explanation: Pitch is how high or low a sound seems to our ears. Higher frequency waves vibrate more times per second, which our ears perceive as a higher-pitched sound. Lower frequencies sound lower-pitched.
